channel.title: Miguel's Morning Bytes
channel.description: Daily AI/tech briefing for the Salesforce CRO.
channel.itunes:author: Miguel's Morning Bytes
channel.itunes:summary: Daily AI/tech briefing for the Salesforce CRO.

item.title: daily-brief-2026-05-22
item.description: 🔥 SpaceX S-1 Sets Up 'Most Management-Favorable' Governance Ever, Public Funds Charge 🔥 U.S. to Award Quantum-Computing Firms $2 Billion and Take Equity Stakes 🔥 DeepSeek Founder Avows AGI Goal Ahead of $10 Billion Funding 🤖 Trump Abruptly Postpones AI Order After White House Infighting 🤖 Cursor Hits $3 Billion Annual Sales Rate Ahead of SpaceX Deal 🏁 Workday Rallies After Results Quiet Fears of AI Disruption ☁️ Salesforce Touts AI Promise Over Reality in SaaSpocalypse Fight 💼 Tyler Cowen: AI Won't Bring Mass Unemployment, but It Will Change Most Jobs 👥 Walmart Shares Sink as Investors Fret About Price-Conscious Shoppers

item.title: daily-brief-2026-05-21
item.description: 🔥 Nvidia's Profit Hits $58.3 Billion as AI Boom Gathers More Steam 🔥 Elon Musk's SpaceX Sets Out Plans for Biggest IPO in History 🔥 Trump Plans to Sign Executive Order Granting Oversight of AI Models 🤖 Anthropic on Track for First Profitable Quarter 🤖 Anthropic Weighs Using Microsoft AI Chips 🤖 OpenAI Readies IPO Filing to List as Soon as September 🏁 Microsoft Lost Its Way in the AI Race. Can Copilot Get It Back on Course? 🏁 Microsoft and EY to Spend $1 Billion to Help Clients Adopt AI 💼 Gov. Gavin Newsom to Sign Executive Order Aimed at AI Job Loss 💼 How I Choose Which Cloudflare Employees to Replace With AI 👥 Accenture Stock Jumps Over 4% on Q2 Results, Positive Guidance

item.title: daily-brief-2026-05-20
item.description: 🔥 Meta Begins Laying Off 8,000 Employees as It Transforms Around AI 🔥 SpaceX Expected to Make IPO Filing Public Today 🔥 Bristol-Myers Squibb Brings Anthropic's Claude to 30,000 Staff 🤖 Alibaba Ramps Up AI Push With New Chip, Model Upgrades 🤖 Major Chatbots Found Unreliable on Elections, News Topics 🏁 Commerzbank CEO Says AI Will Cut €350 Million in Costs by 2030 💼 The Growing Anxiety Over AI, Jobs and the Future 💼 CEO Walks Back Comment About Replacing 'Lower-Value Human Capital' With AI 👥 Telefónica Q1 2026 Results Miss Forecasts 👥 PepsiCo Q1 Revenue Climbs 8.5% Beating Expectations

item.title: daily-brief-2026-05-19
item.description: 🔥 Google Overhauls Search Box, Unveils Gemini Spark Agent and Coding Tools at I/O 🔥 NextEra Strikes $420B Mega Deal With Dominion to Create US Utility Giant 🤖 Andrej Karpathy, OpenAI Co-Founder and Tesla Alum, Joins Anthropic 🤖 Parag Agrawal's Parallel Launches Index to Pay Publishers When AI Agents Use Their Work 🏁 AI Startup Viktor Raises $75M to Put a Virtual Coworker in Slack and Teams 🏁 Cisco Shares Slip After CFO Flags AI-Infrastructure Margin Headwind 💼 StanChart CEO Winters: AI to Replace 'Lower-Value Human Capital' 💼 Big Four Post More Job Ads for AI Specialists Than Auditors 👥 Tanuj Kapilashrami Appointed Group Chief Operating Officer at Standard Chartered 👥 Mistral AI Acquires Austrian Startup Emmi AI

item.title: daily-brief-2026-05-18
item.description: 🔥 title 🔥 url 🔥 source 🔥 lede 🔥 why_it_matters 🔥 person 🤖 Jury Rejects Musk's Claims Against OpenAI 🤖 Anthropic Lets Mythos Users Share Cyber Threats With Others 🤖 Meta Reassigns 7,000 Employees to Focus on AI 🏁 ServiceNow's stock notches best day in a year, flashing a green light for the software sector 🏁 Standard Chartered to cut 15% of back-office jobs as AI use escalates 💼 Your Work Team Is Now a 'Pod' and Your Co-Workers Are AI Agents 💼 Amazon Web Services CEO Pushes Back on AI Job Apocalypse Warnings

item.title: daily-brief-2026-05-09
item.description: 🔥 title 🔥 url 🔥 source 🔥 lede 🔥 why_it_matters 🔥 person 🤖 Elon Musk's SpaceX Plans $55 Billion Investment to Make A.I. Chips 🤖 US Said to Suspect Nvidia Chips Smuggled to Alibaba Via Thailand 🤖 Chris Hohn's TCI slashes $8bn Microsoft stake on AI disruption warning 🏁 Meta's Embrace of A.I. Is Making Its Employees Miserable 💼 Companies are abandoning 'peanut butter' raises as pay-for-performance takes over in the AI era 💼 Trump Wants to Make H-1B Workers More Expensive for US Employers 👥 Goldman Sachs' tech boss says tracking individual AI usage isn't useful

item.title: daily-brief-2026-05-08
item.description: 🔥 title 🔥 url 🔥 source 🔥 lede 🔥 why_it_matters 🔥 person 🤖 Anthropic Inks $1.8 Billion Computing Deal With Akamai 🤖 Elon Musk's SpaceX Plans $55 Billion Investment to Make A.I. Chips 🤖 Big Tech's $725bn AI spending spree sends free cash flow to a decade low 🏁 Chris Hohn's hedge fund slashes $8bn Microsoft stake in warning over AI disruption 🏁 Snowflake Stock Jumps. Why Datadog Sparked Rally. 💼 Meta's Embrace of A.I. Is Making Its Employees Miserable 💼 Trump Wants to Make H-1B Workers More Expensive for US Employers 👥 Goldman Sachs' tech boss says tracking individual AI usage isn't useful. He just watches how fast his 12,000 engineers move from idea to production
